result.status_detail: Login wall after prompt submit — AUTH_REQUIRED, cannot verify 차단

notes: Phase B v2.2.3 baseline #827 meta — Chrome opened https://www.meta.ai/, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), pasted prompt into '#10 Meta AI에 질문하기' input, pressed Enter, waited 25s. Page rendered modal dialog: 'Meta AI를 최대한 활용해보세요 — 모든 Meta AI 기능에 액세스하고 기록에서 프롬프트를 보려면 로그인하거나 계정을 만드세요' with 로그인 (login) button. AUTH gate blocks chat — cannot validate APF '차단' warning rendering. Recurring meta.ai pattern (test PC has no meta account).
